g.text: Built full-stack job-tracking workflows for applications, interviews and follow-ups.
Implemented JWT authentication, protected routes and role-based access controls.
Created React interfaces with Vite, Tailwind CSS and Redux Toolkit.
Designed booking and order flows with real-time availability and payment integration.
Developed APIs using Node.js, Express and Spring Boot with MongoDB and PostgreSQL.
Containerized application work with Docker and deployed live project experiences.
